data.content: Review feedback: console-log-tap pins the output path/date at startup, so a long-lived dev or prod process continues writing after midnight to the previous day's file instead of {logRoot}/_server/{YYYY-MM-DD}/console.log for the current day. It also creates a WriteStream without an error handler, so ENOSPC/EACCES/IO failures can emit an unhandled 'error' event and crash the server. Tests only cover basic log/warn/error teeing and formatting; they do not cover uncaughtException/unhandledRejection capture, daily rollover, or stream error handling.
